misconfig_patterns: root user with empty password in default deployment
MySQL wire protocol at :3307 — connects without password
VECTOR type columns (Databend 1.2.x+) enumerable via SHOW CREATE TABLE

active_probe.false_positive_check: response or headers must include databend string — port 8000 has high collision risk

deployment_tells: GET /v1/health returns Databend version info without auth
Databend vector type: ARRAY(FLOAT32 NOT NULL) in schema
pivot_paths: GET /v1/health → version string for CVE matching
POST /v1/query with SQL SHOW DATABASES → list all databases
MySQL :3307 → SHOW TABLES; DESCRIBE {table} → detect vector columns
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
